name: Beaked Buccaneer
short_description: Beaked Buccaneer is a 2D mini metroidvania full of treasures and pirates that tells the story of a parrot who wants to become a pirate legend!
detailed_description:
Beaked is a pirate parrot in a quest to find his own treasures and to become a pirate legend!

They used to say that parrots aren't pirates on their own, they need a captain to perch on their shoulder. But not this time, this is the story a little bird told me, about a parrot in search of his own treasures and adventures! A Beaked Buccaneer!

Travel through pirate themed scenarios seeking for valuable items that will help you to conquer precious treasures and to defeat Captain Smelly and his gang!

FEATURES
- Four different pirate-themed scenarios;
- Colorful 8-bit style graphics;
- Several useful items to find and equip;
- Simplified leveling system;
- Many pirate treasure chests to find;
- Alternative paths.
